title: Keep Smiling
writer: Monty Banks, Clyde Bruckman, Herman C. Raymaker
actors: Monty Banks, Robert Edeson, Anne Cornwall
plot: The Boy, involved in a maritime disaster as a child, suffers from hydrophobia. He invents a life preserver that automatically inflates when it hits the water, using it to save the life of Rose Ryan, the daughter of a steamship magnat
